content.content: Honduran professional football player who is best known for playing as an attacking midfielder. He is known for playing as a part of the Olimpia club along with the Honduran national team. With a passion for the sport at a young age, he first began playing for the youth club team of Olimpia starting in 1999. After ten years with the team, he started his senior career for Olimpia. He earned more recognition after 2008 when he began playing for the Honduras Under 17 national team. In 2009, he was included by Emilio Umanzor in Honduras's 21 man squad for the 2009 FIFA Under 17 World Cup. He was born and raised in Tegucigalpa, Honduras. As a member of the Honduras national team, he can be seen in relation to other players includingMaynor FigueroaandEmilio Izaguirre.
